title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 442.220 - Conveyances of bounty lands, how acknowledged
text:
442.220.  Conveyances of bounty lands, how acknowledged. — Every instrument of writing executed out of this state, and within the United States, which conveys or affects military bounty lands in this state, and which is acknowledged or proved according to the laws and usages of the place where executed, shall be received and recorded in the county where such lands lie.
(RSMo 1939 § 3441) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3054; 1919 § 2213; 1909 § 2824
